title: Rabies - NHS
text:

Symptoms include:
numbness or tingling where you were bitten or scratched seeing things that are not there (hallucinations) feeling very anxious or energetic difficulty swallowing or breathing being unable to move (paralysis) Once symptoms appear, rabies is almost always fatal.
